description: Sophisticated end-unit townhome that feels more like a detached home. Immaculately kept, it features 9-ft ceilings, open concept floorplan, custom millwork & upgraded lighting throughout. The chef-inspired kitchen impresses with a rare walk-in pantry & opens to a bright living area with access to a deck with natural gas hookup. Upstairs offers 3 generous sized bedrooms, including a spacious primary with double-sink ensuite & WIC. A versatile lower-level room can serve as a 4th bedroom, office, gym or media room. Radiant heat floors, A/C, on-demand hot water, EV-ready & double garage with epoxy flooring. Fenced backyard perfect for kids, pets & entertaining. Close to parks, walking trails, Maddaugh Elementary & Salish Secondary, 5 minutes to Costco, Willowbrook Mall, Walmart & more!
